caption: A news broadcast features multiple screens and video feeds. A man in a white shirt appears in several segments, including a close-up where the on-screen text reads "Tanya Cole: Perception in itself does more harm than actual corruption" and another where the text states "The removal of a CJN by a president is unheard of." Other feeds show crowds of people in outdoor settings, some wearing casual clothing and others in white attire, as well as a street scene with people walking near vehicles. On-screen overlays include technical data such as "100-6," "RSS," "EPP," and "PLUS POLITICS," along with a large number "52" at the top. The scene shifts from a structured multi-window layout to a blurry, distorted view and eventually returns to a grid showing the man in the white shirt alongside footage of a crowd.
